hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(py|js)$' || exit 0; cd /Users/victorrentea/PycharmProjects/training-assistant && python3 -m pytest test_main.py -q 2>&1 | tail -5 && node test_participant_js.js 2>&1 | tail -2 && python3 -m pytest test_e2e.py -q 2>&1 | tail -5
